lane.title: 09 POS Write
lane.last_task: Captain POS session-expired gap + refund audit
lane.last_summary: Deep-audited Captain POS operational issue on HE production test.hamzahotel.com after tablet showed Odoo Server Error / Session expired during payment validation. Verified this was Captain-only: Cash and Ground POS sales continued, Captain config/session/pricelists/payment methods remained healthy, and V2 Captain offer pricing itself was correct. Found Captain backend sequence 2670-6 had local/server save gaps after repeated stale-tab payment attempts: user water test saved as 2670-6-000006, photographed ₹746.35 order was later re-entered and saved as 2670-6-000005 with matching lines/table/payment, leaving only 2670-6-000004 unresolved. May 1-current Captain sequence audit found historical missing 2662-6-000127 between 20 May 2026 03:05:54 IST and 14:38:26 IST, likely around previous-day closing/new-session transition. Read-only audited refund order 8059: HE - Captain - 000035 REFUND is currently a paid negative refund for -₹125 at 25 May 2026 03:03 IST, linked to original order 7731 from 22 May 2026; user explicitly stopped any correction, so no write was performed.
lane.next_action: Do not mutate refund order 8059 unless Nihaf explicitly resumes and confirms. Operationally, staff must confirm whether 2670-6-000004 was a real second bill or just a failed duplicate local slot; if real, re-enter that bill from staff/KDS/payment evidence. For Captain tablets, close stale POS tabs, reload/login fresh before payment validation, then verify new Captain order sequence saves in backend.
lane.mutation_status: No new mutation in this follow-up. Read-only Odoo/POS audits only; previous V2 pricelist mutation remains unchanged. Refund 8059 was not modified because user said wait/don't do anything.

recent_events.task: Verify re-entry status for two missing Captain orders
recent_events.summary: Read-only HE Odoo check after staff/user action shows the photographed ₹746.35 Captain bill has now been entered and paid as backend order id 8055, reference 2670-6-000005, table First Floor Dine-In 6, pricelist 45, payment HE UPI ₹746.35 at 2026-05-25 02:55:45 IST, with exact photo lines. Current 2670-6 backend sequence present [1,2,3,5,6]; only 2670-6-000004 remains missing. Therefore one of the two missing sequence slots is reconciled; the remaining slot may be a duplicate failed attempt or another real missed bill and needs staff confirmation.
recent_events.next_action: Ask staff whether there was any second real Captain bill after 23:20 IST besides the ₹746.35 bill and water test. If no, mark 2670-6-000004 as failed duplicate/local retry only; if yes, re-enter that second bill.
recent_events.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation by Codex. Staff/user re-entered ₹746.35 bill as 2670-6-000005.

recent_events.task: May Captain POS sequence gap audit
recent_events.summary: Read-only HE Odoo sequence audit from 2026-05-01 UTC through current time found 352 backend Captain orders across 10 Captain reference groups. Only two Captain reference groups have backend sequence gaps: historical 2662-6 missing 000127 between 000126 on 2026-05-19 21:35:54 UTC and 000128 on 2026-05-20 09:08:26 UTC; current 2670-6 missing 000004 and 000005 between 000003 at 2026-05-24 17:48:25 UTC and test water order 000006 at 2026-05-24 21:19:08 UTC. Current incident therefore accounts for exactly two missing Captain sequence slots; total Captain missing sequence slots since May 1 within backend-seen ranges is three.
recent_events.next_action: Reconcile current 2670-6-000004/000005 from staff/UPI/KDS/table memory; optionally separately investigate historical 2662-6-000127 around 2026-05-20 morning if finance wants full May exception cleanup.
recent_events.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation. Read-only sequence audit only.
